productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Bullrider Striper Polo Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with green and grey stripes bunched between white stripes, front buttoned neck with white branded buttons on placket, ribbed collar in black, ribbed sleeve hems, embroidered logo on left chest, split side ends with twill strips inside, branding on fabric on inner neck and comes with an extra buttonFittingcomfortWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Designed for the man of regal style, this black polo t-shirt from wrangler has thin green and grey stripes bunched between two thin white stripes, adding to it a fashionable touch. Made of pure cotton, this tee will keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the ribbed sleeve hems sit snugly around your well-toned arms. The splits on the hem provide a comfortable Fit, while the embroidered branding redefines your sense of style. Team this tee with denims and comfortable lifestyle footwear from the wide range available at myntra for those semi-formal and casual events.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
